{"problem_standardized_math":"Find the quadratic function\n\\[\nm(x_1,x_2)=f+g_1x_1+g_2x_2+\\frac{1}{2}G_{11}^2x_1^2+G_{12}x_1x_2+\\frac{1}{2}G_{22}^2x_2^2\n\\]\nthat interpolates the data at the points\n\\[\ny^1=(0,0)^T,\\quad y^2=(1,0)^T,\\quad y^3=(2,0)^T,\\quad y^4=(1,1)^T,\\quad y^5=(0,2)^T,\\quad y^6=(0,1)^T,\n\\]\nwith \\(x_0=y^1\\), and function values\n\\[\nf(y^1)=1,\\quad f(y^2)=2.0084,\\quad f(y^3)=7.0091,\\quad f(y^4)=1.0168,\\quad f(y^5)=-0.9909,\\quad f(y^6)=-0.9916.\n\\]"}
